name: Breakfast Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 package (2 1/2 oz) Carl Buddig Ham, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg until light.
2. Add sugar, sour cream, shortening, and mustard; stir well.
3. Add dry ingredients; stir just until moistened. Do not overbeat.
4. Gently stir in ham and cheese.
5. Fill greased muffin tins 3/4 full.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
Yield: 12 muffins or 32 mini-muffins.
